title: keraselma rubrum
intro: Keraselma rubrum, also known as Red-berried Treacle Moss, is a type of lichen that grows on trees in Northern Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Keraselma rubrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Keraselma rubrum are typically made by infusing the lichen in hot water or alcohol, and can be used as a tea, tincture, or topical cream.
